description: Configure the provided classroom scene (/home/ga/BlenderProjects/vr_classroom.blend) for a Virtual Reality (VR) 360-degree render. Set the Render Engine to Cycles and position the active camera at X: -5.0m, Y: 0.0m, Z: 1.5m. Configure the camera as a Panoramic type with Equirectangular projection and set the render resolution to 2048x1024 pixels. Render the final image to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/classroom_360.png and save the modified project to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/classroom_vr_setup.blend.
